new_value: Completed audit: All scalar mult (crypto_eddsa_scalarbase/recover_r at schnorr48.c:97,176 etc; monocypher.c:2192+; dalek * in schnorr.rs:36+) and comparisons (crypto_verify16 at schnorr48.c:194,468; ct_eq at schnorr.rs:144) are constant-time. Vartime ge_frombytes_neg_vartime used only on public inputs per Monocypher contract. No memcmp on secrets, no secret-dependent branches in crypto paths. Compliant with spec §5.3. No code changes needed. See full report.
